reason_for_decision: The article passes because it compares band choice through mission geometry, weather behavior, and system fit instead of through shallow frequency labels.
strengths: The article explains what actually changes between C, X, and Ku band in operational terms, not only spectrum terms.
It keeps the selection tied to target set, weather, aperture, and workflow, which is the right planning lens.
The procurement sequence near the end gives readers a usable way to narrow the band choice for real projects.
summary_assessment: This is a strong comparison article. It is technically grounded, practically useful, and avoids the common mistake of treating higher frequency as automatically better.
